tier.label: Professional masterclass
tier.standard: Default quality bar for serious workplace learning and strong source discipline.

score.summary: Knowledge-base score 89/100 (excellent): coverage 100, authority 79, recency 75. 14/12 sources, 4/3 primary.

messages: Knowledge base meets the selected Professional masterclass floor.

modules.title: Orientation and learner baseline
modules.goal: Set the purpose, audience floor, assumptions, and mastery target.

modules.goal: Show what the approved sources support, what is missing, and what must not be invented.
